name: Sports Boss Golf Exchange
about: Sports Boss Golf Exchange is a family-owned golf emporium in Leland, Illinois, offering a comprehensive selection of new, used, reconditioned, and custom golf equipment, along with expert repair and upgrade services. The facility features a state-of-the-art golf simulator and fitting studio, providing a platform for players of all skill levels to enhance their game through technology and expert guidance. The business operates both an online store and a physical location, and actively accepts trade-ins to help customers upgrade their equipment affordably.
why_golfers_like_it: Houses over 10,000 clubs to choose from for all skill levels
Offers expert club fitting services with a state-of-the-art simulator
Accepts trade-ins to make upgrading equipment affordable

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or browse their extensive selection of over 10,000 clubs for purchase or fitting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a food or drink service, suggesting outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a 'family owned golf emporium' and offers services suitable for juniors and youth.
